name: Fibe Axis Bank Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Fibe Axis Bank Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: Lifetime free card with nil joining fee and nil annual fee
3% cashback on food delivery, entertainment and local commute
1% cashback on all other eligible spends
RuPay credit card on UPI support
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per calendar year at select airport lounges
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel spends between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 400 per month
Dining Delights offers through Axis Bank dining programme
Wednesday Delight offers including MakeMyTrip, Swiggy and Tira offers as per Axis programme terms
Fibe Axis Bank Credit Card is sourced only to existing Fibe customers

salaried: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India or NRI
Card is sourced only to existing Fibe customers
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India or NRI
Card is sourced only to existing Fibe customers
